steps.t: The first vantage point can be found by climbing the hill directly east of Oldheart. You should climb the hill and <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb>…
The second vantage point can be found by climbing the ridge further. You should climb further and <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb> for the missing …
Oldheart stands in his meadow below the great hill, waiting for news. You should return to Oldheart and tell him what you saw from on high.
